steps.title: Foreground the collection
steps.content: The student wants to introduce Marisol Vega's 1983 poetry collection. The best sentence should make Precario/Precarious the focus and identify its year, publisher, genre, and author. Information about later books or earlier exhibitions can appear only if it serves that introduction.

steps.title: Reject off-topic focus
steps.content: A makes the 1971 exhibition the main topic, B never names the 1983 collection, and D introduces a 1971 exhibition in Chile. Those do not introduce the poetry collection itself for readers. The answer is C.
